name: Contort Effect
short_description: In Contort Effect they dive into a blurred world of reality. Use your ability of time manipulation and keep your enemies at a distance. You're going through a monstrosity of soulless robots against everyone. Wander through the levels with different weapons and kill your enemies.
detailed_description:
"Contort Effect" immerses players into a captivating blend of reality and a fictional future, creating a visually stunning neon-designed environment. Harness the power of time manipulation to your advantage, keeping your adversaries at bay. In this adrenaline-fueled game, you'll navigate through levels filled with soulless robots, armed with an array of weapons to eliminate your foes.

Survive the onslaught of bullets while uncovering the intriguing background story that unfolds throughout the gameplay. With its distinct Surreal Still art style, "Contort Effect" stands as a true graphical masterpiece, offering a unique and immersive first-person shooter experience on the Steam platform.

Prepare to be captivated by the allure of this game and embark on an unforgettable journey into one of the top first-person shooters of 2019!

GAMEPLAY:
- They used different weapons to stop their enemies.
- Did you use the time manipulation

Content:
-Over 30 levels
-Steam successes
-Heavy AI
- Unique graphic style
